summary: First full-stack test pass of LastLap Racer Hub. Backend: 15/15 pytest tests pass (auth login/register/me, tasks list/start/complete with LP increment, leaderboard with you+rank, stats, referrals, reset-timer, referral-awards-50-LP). Frontend: login -> Dashboard works with all 4 stat cards, 4 START TASK buttons, leaderboard panel with YOUR RANK row, Build Your Crew. START TASK opens external URL in popup and auto-completes task (LP increments). /leaderboard, /tasks (Rider Garage), /register pages all render correctly with proper data. Logout via profile dropdown returns to /login. No console errors.

minor.issue: allow_credentials=True combined with allow_origins='*' (default) is invalid per CORS spec; browsers reject credentialed wildcard. App uses Bearer tokens so it works today, but if cookies are ever added this will break. Recommend setting explicit origins.

action_items: (Low) Consider adding type="submit" to the login/register submit buttons for accessibility / non-data-testid testing. Currently submit relies on form onSubmit + Enter or testid click; functional but minor a11y polish.
(Low) Tighten CORS_ORIGINS to explicit frontend origin instead of '*' when allow_credentials=True.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~540 lines and mixes auth + tasks + leaderboard + referrals + seeding in one module. Consider splitting into routers/auth.py, routers/tasks.py, routers/leaderboard.py, seed.py for maintainability.
Demo user seed sets daily_streak=4 and lap_points=2450, but no scheduled task updates daily_streak. Streak is effectively static. OK for demo.
MongoDB _id properly excluded in all responses (sanitize_user + projections). Good.
Bcrypt is used correctly (gensalt/checkpw); JWT_SECRET read from env; no hardcoded secrets in code.
All endpoints use Pydantic models for input validation. Good.
Frontend AuthContext stores JWT in localStorage as ll_token (XSS risk theoretical but acceptable for this gamified app). httpOnly cookies would be safer.
Login.jsx submit button missing explicit type='submit' (works via form onSubmit but brittle for generic selectors).
test_credentials: riderghost@lastlap.com / Demo2025! (seeded with LAST-8842 referral); admin@lastlap.com / LastLap2025!
seed_data_creation: Backend already seeds 8 tasks + demo user + admin + 25 fake racers on startup. Tests created additional test_* and ref_* and task_* users (LP=0 or 100). These do not pollute leaderboard top.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend uses data-testid='login-email', 'login-password', 'login-submit' (NOT login-email-input/login-submit-button). Profile dropdown trigger is 'button:has-text("riderghost")'; logout-button testid only appears after the profile dropdown is opened. START TASK opens external_url in a popup window then auto-completes after 1.5s via /complete. /tasks route renders as 'RIDER GARAGE' page with all 8 tasks (titles rendered uppercased via CSS). Dashboard LP value displayed with comma formatting (e.g., '2,500'). All 15 backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_lastlap_api.py pass against the public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL.
